ir.caption: The infrared video begins with a series of black frames, transitioning into a brightly lit indoor hallway. I encounter a white door equipped with a standard lever handle and an electronic lock. As I proceed down the corridor, multiple doors line the walls. Entering the room, the scene reveals a compact bathroom stall with a white ceramic sink, a chrome faucet, and a wall-mounted toilet. Adjacent to the sink, there is a white hand sanitizer or soap dispenser with a push-lever and a white light switch. A mirror reflects a subject wearing a thermal-contrasting white puffy jacket and a helmet with a camera rig. A small paper sign is taped to the wall with the text 'PLEASE FLUSH THE TOILET'.
